data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for 'Unlock transitions and audit trail'.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Unlock transitions and audit trail', but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to this requirement. While the linked use case outlines the need for an audit trail, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that demonstrate its implementation or validation. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of unlock transitions and audit trail validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the unlock transitions and audit trail.
